result.stdout:
Usage pattern:

    dotnet  Olive.EventBusCommandGenerator.dll  /assembly:... /command:... [/out:...] [/push:... /apiKey:...]

 PARAMETERS: 
--------------------
 assembly: File name of the assembly containing the command. Usually it's the path to the 'Website.dll'.

 command: The name of the event bus command class. If there are multiple classes with the same name, provide the full name with namespace.

 out: The full path to a directory to publish the generated nuget packages. e.g. C:\Projects\my-solution\PrivatePackages

 push: The url of a [private] nuget server to publish the generated package to. For example: http://nuget.my-solution.my-server.com/nuget

 apiKey: The Api Key expected by the [private] nuget server, for security.
